headline: Clearway Energy (CWEN) Beats Stock Market Upswing: What Investors Need to Know
summary: Clearway Energy (CWEN) reached $38.38 at the closing of the latest trading day, reflecting a +1.64% change compared to its last close.

headline: What to Expect From NRG Energy's Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: NRG Energy is set to release its first-quarter results next month, and analysts are expecting a double-digit decline in the company’s bottom-line figure.
